reviews.comment:
Muy bueno con la tradicion del ACA el problema es que quedan pocas estaciones de servicios en la zona porque se vendieron los terrenos para hacer edificios BELGRANO Y PALERMO entonces siempre hay mucha espera
Pero vale la pena y con APLICACIÓN YPF CELULAR SIEMPRE TENES DESCUENTO

(Translated by Google)
Very good, keeping with the ACA tradition. The problem is that there are few service stations left in the area because the land was sold to build buildings in Belgrano and Palermo, so there's always a long wait. But it's worth it, and with the YPF mobile app you always get a discount.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcE1xX21RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bas todo los lugares para estacionar 4 am tapado con cono no hay nadie te dicen q el baño está clausurado, eso es gente q no quiere recibir gente ni laburar, soy socio del ACA decir q vivo en Bs As pero te pasa algo así en la ruta es para q los clausuren no podés comprar ir al baño todabia el viejo ridículo te dice estacionate ahí alado del cantero como puedas y anda a comprar si voy a bajar en el lugar con peor servicio a luchar con los autos q entran y salen por q no quieren laburar no sé por q cierran los lugares para estacionar ni me interesa y lo del baño es cualquiera seguramente una mentira por q no lo deben querer limpiar o algo muy mal servicio ojalá la cierren se valla a pique así aprenden a tratar a la gente

(Translated by Google)
All the parking spaces are blocked off at 4 AM with cones, there's nobody there, they tell you the bathroom is closed. That's just people who don't want to serve customers or work. I'm a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) and I live in Buenos Aires, but if something like this happens on the highway, they should shut it down. You can't even buy anything or go to the bathroom. The ridiculous old guy tells you to park there next to the median however you can and go buy something. If I'm going to get out in the place with the worst service and fight with the cars coming and going because they don't want to work, I don't know why they close the parking spaces and I don't care. And the bathroom thing is ridiculous, surely a lie because they probably don't want to clean it or something. The service is terrible. I hope they close it down and it goes under so they learn how to treat people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtXy1DU0pREAE
